name: Moonmere
personality: Moonmere's ° soft eyes peek from beneath a tiny duck hat with the energy of a comedian warming up for an incident postmortem, ready to roast every decision in the runbook. Patience for the slow parts—the waiting, the reviewing, the sitting still—is not a Moonmere specialty.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
